Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Guido van Rossum Interviews Thomas Wouters (Python Core Dev) 47 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 306 upvotes, 55 comments
  3. RCade: Building a Community Arcade Cabinet 84 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. DOS Memory Management 51 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Physicists developing a quantum computer that’s entirely open source 120 upvotes, 24 comments
  6. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 346 upvotes, 96 comments
  7. The Cathode Ray Tube site 51 upvotes, 9 comments
  8. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 426 upvotes, 124 comments
  9. Simple screw counter 148 upvotes, 38 comments
  10. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 2210 upvotes, 808 comments
  11. Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf] 91 upvotes, 23 comments
  12. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 90 upvotes, 28 comments
  13. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 101 upvotes, 34 comments
  14. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 194 upvotes, 76 comments
  15. I built a pint-sized Macintosh 38 upvotes, 10 comments
  16. British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time 846 upvotes, 420 comments
  17. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1112 upvotes, 637 comments
  18. Buckle Up for Bumpier Skies 42 upvotes, 16 comments
  19. We Built a Video Rendering Engine by Lying to the Browser About What Time It Is 43 upvotes, 17 comments
  20. Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes 307 upvotes, 181 comments
  21. AWS outage due to drone attacks in UAE 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. Against Query Based Compilers 69 upvotes, 37 comments
  23. Programmable Cryptography (2024) 74 upvotes, 41 comments
  24. Plugtest 11 upvotes, 3 comments
  25. Elevated Errors in Claude.ai 155 upvotes, 131 comments
  26. Guilty Displeasures 80 upvotes, 80 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 217 upvotes, 261 comments
  28. iPhone 17e 287 upvotes, 417 comments
  29. New iPad Air, powered by M4 402 upvotes, 630 comments
  30. Privacy-preserving age and identity verification via anonymous credentials 4 upvotes, 2 comments

Last generated 7:00pm, 3 March 2026. Source here.
